channel.title: Heroku on Louis LIN's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Heroku on Louis LIN's blog

item.title: Deploying a Golang web apps to Heroku
item.description: Deploying a Golang web apps to Heroku is quite easy.

item.title: Deploying a MeteorJS apps to Heroku
item.description: I thought deploying a MeteorJS to Heroku would be a difficult task, but it turns out to be quite easy after all. You just need to execute those commands: cd /path/to/meteor/app heroku config:add BUILDPACK_URL=https://github.com/oortcloud/heroku-buildpack-meteorite.git git push heroku master
